impacted_layer: Translation Engine governance + ingest profiling handoff
borrowed_pattern: Mandatory approval gate for translation-sensitive changes backed by decision-record policy checks
keep_native_guardrails: Translation-sensitive changes require explicit Phase E approval
No hidden rule mutations without governance artifacts
change_summary: Added translation governance gate script and wired governance-check to enforce decision coverage for translation-sensitive file changes.
acceptance_tests: Translation-sensitive changes with Phase E approval => gate passes
Translation-sensitive changes without Phase E approval => gate fails
rollback_trigger: Translation-sensitive changes bypass governance checks or ship without explicit approval artifacts.
